title: sphaeralcea purpurata
intro: Sphaeralcea purpurata, also known as the Desert Marigold, is a perennial wildflower native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant is valued for its bright orange or yellow flowers and its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Sphaeralcea purpurata include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate skin irritations, making it a popular remedy in herbal medicine. Sphaeralcea purpurata can be prepared in various forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
